title: Schoenoplectiella brachyceras
taxonomy: Schoenoplectiella brachyceras belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. It is a member of the tribe Cyperaeae and the genus Schoenoplectiella. Within the genus Schoenoplectiella, S. brachyceras is classified as a species of sedge. The classification of S. brachyceras is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features.
